title: ctenitis hispida
intro: Ctenitis hispida, also known as the hairy fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, characterized by its delicate, lacy fronds and hairy stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in wound healing and pain relief. The health benefits of Ctenitis hispida include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Ctenitis hispida can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
